code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut index = 0
  mut output = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          if index % 2 == 0
            if first
              output = "#{token}"
              first = false
            else
              output = "#{output} #{token}"
            end
          end
          index = index + 1
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    if index % 2 == 0
      if first
        output = "#{token}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{token}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(output)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
